properties.remark: ROPE TORNADO ON GROUND IN OPEN SPACE FROM ABOUT 115 PM TO 122 PM.

WATER AND DEBRIS ACROSS INTERSTATE 90 NEAR MILEPOSTS 90 AND 91. INTERSTATE IS CLOSED BETWEEN BUFFALO AND GILLETTE.
